meaning: n.大体育馆,大剧场,大公共娱乐场
examples: The band's performance that night at the Seattle Center Coliseum was a letdown.
Rihanna at Nassau Veterans Memorial Coliseum in Uniondale, N.Y., on Tuesday night.
No, no, that man who has stopped near the Coliseum is there purely by accident.
The Islanders won for only the fourth time in 13 games at Nassau Coliseum.
